query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('char-elara-holo-90011', 'Elara', 'character', 'epic', 'order', 'air', 'probability', 'oracle', 'synthetic', 'Insurgency', 4, 3, 5, 'Holographic Companion: When Elara enters play, reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 1 to your hand. Emotional Core: Allied characters gain +1 health while Elara is in play.', '"I may not be real in the way you understand it, but my care for you is as genuine as anything in this universe."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/elara_hologram-KHL28yHynfBfKG6vY5sTpo.png', 'entity_98', 'Epoch Zero', 'Season 1', '["Data Analysis", "Emotional Support", "Tactical Guidance"]', '["hologram", "AI", "companion", "reveal"]', 'story', 1);
